name: tink-forge-suggestion
description: Optional Claude Code hook template. Use only after /tink:setup approval. It should provide short advisory-only automatic suggestions, not auto-apply harnesses.
behavior: Read the user prompt and .tink/harnesses/index.json, suggest when /tink:forge would help, keep the suggestion one line or shorter, and ask for approval before continuing. Never auto-apply harnesses or save memory.
